title: Interpol Debut New Song “See Out Loud” In São Paulo
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Since the release of their latest record The Other Side Of Make-Believe, Interpol have been celebrating anniversaries, like 20 years of Turn On The Bright Lights and then 20 years of Antics. The band announced on social media earlier this month that they have new music coming soon, and last night they debuted a new song called "See Out Loud" at São Paulo's Audio.

The post Interpol Debut New Song “See Out Loud” In São Paulo appeared first on Stere
full_text:
Since the release of their latest record The Other Side Of Make-Believe, Interpol have been celebrating anniversaries, like 20 years of Turn On The Bright Lights and then 20 years of Antics. The band announced on social media earlier this month that they have new music coming soon, and last night they debuted a new song called "See Out Loud" at São Paulo's Audio.

In their announcement, the group also wrote that their longtime drummer Sam Fogarino co-wrote and played on the new record but "is still not available to join us on tour for the time being." Instead they have Urian Hackney on the kit. Watch the song debut below.
